title: Randomized Initialization Test (Task #19)

content.hypothesis: Stage 2 gradient descent converges beta/gamma to a stable optimum
content.method: 5 randomized (beta, gamma) starting points, measure final positions after gradient descent
content.result: All 5 starting points stayed at initialization. Max parameter shift: 0.0035. Gradient descent produced STASIS, not convergence
content.root_cause: Gradient bottleneck: (1) NC×D averaging divides by 72, (2) response×dphi product (~0.0015) is 100× weaker than alpha's resp_z (~1.0)

constraints_implied: Analytical gradient magnitude is too weak for beta/gamma without 100-1000× learning rate boost
